/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libbase_demo_cpp__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so -o libbase_demo_cpp__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so CMakeFiles/base_demo_cpp__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/base_demo_cpp/msg/base_status__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/shu/ros2_ws/build/base_demo_cpp:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libbase_demo_cpp__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
